Part Name: TFP401 - Video Decoder Video Evaluation Board
Part For: Driving the Display. Takes HDMI and MicroUSB in and outputs the signals over 40 pin TFT to the touchscreen
Primary display for the X-1. Outputs touchscreen input VIA MicroUSB
Takes the input from the MicroHDMI to HDMI STUB
Takes Input from the RPI5 (Main Computational Circuitry) and converts it to HDMI
Gives power to the display driver board. And sends touchscreen inputs to the RPI5.
Connects the X1 to the internet via LTE. Includes antenna and $25 SIM credit.

Part Price: ~$26.54 (Ended up being 233 dollars due to taxes and shipping)

Part For: Battery pack for the X1. For further models (X2, X3) an actual battery pack would be used.
